data.revised_prompt: Stylized-concept art for a cultivation roguelite enemy: a cute but hostile chibi thunder elite warrior, clean HD hand-painted 2D game concept, full body visible, centered, three-quarter RPG combat view, compact idle battle pose, occupying about 56% of the canvas with generous padding and clear feet anchor. Subject: chibi thunder armored elite with a slightly oversized one-horn helm, compact super-deformed silhouette, dark forged charcoal-black armor with muted steel accents, bright electric-blue lightning cracks across chest and one arm, short torn cloth, one small talisman, short lightning spear or blade held ready. Readable combat posture, hostile but compact, simplified details, reduced ornament complexity, no giant cape, no big crown, no extra floating objects, no clutter. Lighting: storm-lit blue rim light with controlled electric glow, strong readable contrast, but no huge VFX. Materials/textures: worn forged armor and cloth, controlled crackling lightning details. Style: crisp silhouette, clean HD, slightly super-deformed fantasy RPG asset, hand-painted 2D, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Background: perfectly flat solid chroma-key #FF00FF only, uniform color, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation, no scene. No text, no UI, no watermark. Avoid magenta in the subject except background.
